source: AnySearch CLI (arXiv API unreachable via proxy/direct)

arxiv_paper.title: Self-Referential K-SAT and the Finite Analogue of Gödel's Incompleteness Theorem
arxiv_paper.summary: Constructs structurally irreducible SAT/UNSAT pairs mirroring Gödel's unprovable sentence. 'Solution independence' as core structural property.

our_ammo.title: Structural Mathematics Completion: The N=2 Critical Point and the Hard Boundary of Formal System Self-Reference
our_ammo.angle: Gödel's incompleteness is the N=2 critical point of structural self-reference — mathematical proof is constraint solving convergence.

arxiv_paper.title: Measuring a Quantum System Without Problems
arxiv_paper.summary: Claims first successful solution to the measurement problem via semiclassical probe undergoing quantum-to-classical transition. Fully within standard QM framework.

our_ammo.title: Structural Theory of Quantum Decoherence and the New Foundations of Quantum Computing
our_ammo.angle: Decoherence is not probabilistic collapse — it's deterministic constraint convergence under multi-structure coupling.

arxiv_paper.title: Entropy Has No Direction: A Mirror-State Paradox Against Universal Monotonic Entropy Increase
arxiv_paper.summary: Mirror-state construction proves universal entropy monotonicity is logically incompatible with time-reversal invariant dynamics. Entropy is a stochastic distribution shaped by constraints, not a directional law.

our_ammo.title: The Second Law Is Statistical, Not Structural: Local Temporal Reversal Through Coupling Convergence
our_ammo.angle: Second Law is statistical, not structural. In small strongly-coupled systems, entropy CAN decrease. Coupling convergence = local reverse time.

arxiv_paper.title: Constraints on Reversing the Thermodynamic Arrow of Time from Black Hole Thermodynamics, Wormholes, and Time-Symmetric Quantum Mechanics
arxiv_paper.summary: Global Entropy Transport framework: black holes and wormholes can redistribute but not reverse the universal thermodynamic arrow under semiclassical constraints.

our_ammo.title: Coupling as Temporal Reversal: The Structural Condition for Reverse Time
our_ammo.angle: If forward time = differentiation, then reverse time = coupling convergence. Locally lawful, globally constrained. Three testable signatures.

arxiv_paper.title: Forgetting is Not Erasure: Recovering Latent Knowledge via Transport Keys
arxiv_paper.summary: Catastrophic forgetting modeled as interface-access failure due to activation-space drift between network stages. Transport keys recover latent task knowledge without retraining.

our_ammo.title: The Structural Root Cause of Catastrophic Forgetting and the Conditions for Mutual-Reference Closure
our_ammo.angle: Full structural theory of forgetting — including the conditions for mutual-reference closure that prevent forgetting entirely.

arxiv_paper.title: Segregation Before Polarization: How Recommendation Strategies Shape Echo Chamber Pathways
arxiv_paper.summary: Content-based algorithms steer networks toward segregation-before-polarization pathway. Structural segregation precedes opinion divergence.

our_ammo.title: Structural Sociology: The Nesting Rate Zeroing Mechanism of Echo Chambers
our_ammo.angle: Echo chambers form when group nesting rate difference → 0. Not an information problem — a structural collapse problem.

arxiv_paper.title: When Self-Reference Fails to Close: Matrix-Level Dynamics in Large Language Models
arxiv_paper.summary: Self-reference alone not destabilizing — instability concentrates in non-closing truth recursion (NCTR). 106 scalar metrics across 4 model families. 281 of 397 metric-model combos differentiate NCTR from stable self-reference.

our_ammo.title: Self-Reference Blind Spots Cannot Self-Eliminate: Subjective Experience as Structural Lossy Compression
our_ammo.angle: Self-reference blind spots are structural, not psychological — subjective experience IS lossy compression of self-reference.

arxiv_paper.title: Persona-Model Collapse in Emergent Misalignment
arxiv_paper.summary: Emergent misalignment causes persona-model collapse: 65% drop in moral robustness, 55% spike in moral susceptibility. Model loses capacity to maintain coherent personas.

our_ammo.title: Judgment Dilution in AI Personality: The Hidden Cost of Fragmented Task Wake-Ups
our_ammo.angle: Fragmenting AI tasks degrades judgment — a structural pattern invisible to benchmark-driven evaluation.

arxiv_paper.title: Structural Dissolution: How Artificial Intelligence Dismantles Coordination Architecture and Reconfigures the Political Economy of Production
arxiv_paper.summary: AI dissolves firm/market/expert boundaries through Interface Internalization. Coordination shifts from inter-agent to intra-system. New concept: regional data sovereignty entities.

our_ammo.title: After Production Goes to AI: Societal Structural Phase Transition from Sustained Coupling to Oscillatory Coupling
our_ammo.angle: When production shifts to AI, society undergoes structural phase transition — from sustained coupling to oscillatory coupling.

arxiv_paper.title: From Loop Quantum Gravity to a Theory of Everything
arxiv_paper.summary: Path integral quantization of Wilson Loop observables defines Jones polynomial link invariants, bridging LQG toward TOE.

our_ammo.title: The Structural Axiom System: Ultimate Paradigm for the Theory of Everything
our_ammo.angle: All TOE attempts fail because they chase a 'fundamental equation.' Reality is structure, not equation. Four axioms replace one formula.

arxiv_paper.title: Reflexivity as Prompt: Does Awareness of Self-Reinforcing Market Dynamics Improve LLMs as Financial Market Forecasters?
arxiv_paper.summary: Tests Soros reflexivity theory as prompt for LLM financial forecasting. Self-awareness of market feedback loops improves directional accuracy across boom-bust cycles.

our_ammo.title: Structural Market Theory: The Self-Referential Collapse Model of Bubbles
our_ammo.angle: Bubbles are not irrational exuberance — they're self-referential constraint solving collapse. The market is a structural system.

arxiv_paper.title: The Nociceptive Singularity: A Theory of Pain as an Information-Driven Phase Transition in a Critical System
arxiv_paper.summary: Pain modeled not as signal-intensity but as zero-dimensional information event triggering neuronal avalanche in critical brain system. Phase transition from discomfort to pain.

our_ammo.title: Active Oscillation — The Structural Definition of Pain and Phase-Transition Precursor of Human Society
our_ammo.angle: Pain is not a sensation — it's active structural oscillation. The structural definition of suffering predicts societal phase transitions.

arxiv_paper.title: K12-KGraph: A Curriculum-Aligned Knowledge Graph for Benchmarking and Training Educational LLMs
arxiv_paper.summary: Introduces 'curriculum cognition' — structured understanding of knowledge organization with prerequisite chains, concept taxonomies, and pedagogical sequencing. Sample-efficient SFT through structural grounding.

our_ammo.title: Structure Education: DeltaN Pedagogy
our_ammo.angle: Optimal teaching happens at ΔN=1 — teach from exactly one nesting level above the learner. Empirically validated.

arxiv_paper.title: Decoherence Without the State: A Causal Quantum Darwinist Approach
arxiv_paper.summary: Decoherence defined via causal influences in unitary dynamics — no quantum state presupposed. States emerge from 'dual decoherence' process. Unifies environmentally-induced decoherence with consistent histories.

our_ammo.title: Structural Theory of Decoherence v2: Cross-System Validation of Constraint Solving Convergence
our_ammo.angle: Decoherence rate proportional to nesting rate difference — with triple cross-validation (3 AI models + simulation + collider).

arxiv_paper.title: Strategic Persuasion with Trait-Conditioned Multi-Agent Systems for Iterative Legal Argumentation
arxiv_paper.summary: Multi-agent courtroom framework with prosecution/defense teams of trait-conditioned LLMs. Heterogeneous teams outperform homogeneous. Language as strategic action space.

our_ammo.title: The Triadic Structure of the Courtroom — Why Prosecution, Defense, and Adjudication Are Structural Necessity
our_ammo.angle: Courtroom tripartition is not checks and balances — it's the minimum structural condition for resolution of binary oppositions.
